description_long: This object is a small, upright cluster of white flowers with prominent yellow centers, supported by slender green stems and surrounded by dense, leafy foliage. The flowers are arranged at the top and along the upper portions of the stems, each displaying multiple elongated petals radiating symmetrically from the center. The leaves are narrow, lanceolate, and a vibrant green, densely packed around the base and lower stems, providing a lush backdrop for the blossoms. The plant emerges from a small mound of soil, suggesting it is rooted and growing naturally. The overall appearance is delicate and ornamental, making it suitable for urban parks, gardens, or sidewalk planters. The white petals contrast sharply with the green foliage, creating a visually striking and fresh look.
description: A cluster of white, yellow-centered flowers with green lanceolate leaves, growing upright from a small soil mound. The plant is lush and ornamental, with symmetrical petals and dense foliage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cluster of white flowers and dense green foliage, with the yellow centers clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the upper flowers and the lushness of the green leaves, with more petals visible on the right.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the vertical arrangement of the stems and flowers, with some flowers partially obscured by foliage.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the flower cluster and the dense green leaves, with fewer flower centers visible.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration around the flower center, with each petal overlapping slightly at the base and displaying clear radial symmetry.
